creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text: We've got to update the release(7) manual page. It should no longer mention Subversion, but Git instead. Also, we removed support for DOCDIR and NODOC in https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/src/commit/?id=f61e92ca5a23450bc28169bbdd71d7674df98c19 so this should be reflected in the manual as well.
